mapper.select: SELECT ID, USING_DEPT_ID, USING_DEPT_NAME, EQUIP_TYPE_ID, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, APP_NUMBER, APP_TYPE, APP_CONTENT, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_ID, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_NAME, BUDGET_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATED_USER, CREATED_TIME, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_IC_MAINT_PROJ_APPLY where ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_IC_MAINT_PROJ_APPLY ( ID, USING_DEPT_ID, USING_DEPT_NAME, EQUIP_TYPE_ID, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, APP_NUMBER, APP_TYPE, APP_CONTENT, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_ID, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_NAME, BUDGET_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATED_USER, CREATED_TIME
) values (#{id,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{usingDeptId}, #{usingDeptName}, #{equipTypeId}, #{equipId}, #{equipName}, #{appNumber}, #{appType}, #{appContent}, #{maintenanceUnitId}, #{maintenanceUnitName}, #{budgetAmount}, #{remark}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into E_IC_MAINT_PROJ_APPLY_QUOTA ( ID, PARENT_ID, QUOTA_CODE, PROJECT_NAME, PROJECT_CONTENT, UNIT, AMOUNT_EXCLUDING_TAX, TAX_RATE, AMOUNT_INCLUDING_TAX, CREATED_USER, CREATED_TIME, PROJECT_NUM ) values (#{id,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{parentId}, #{quotaCode}, #{projectName}, #{projectContent}, #{unit}, #{amountExcludingTax}, #{taxRate}, #{amountIncludingTax}, #{loginUserId}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectNum}
)
mapper.update: UPDATE E_IC_MAINT_PROJ_APPLY SET USING_DEPT_ID = #{usingDeptId}, USING_DEPT_NAME = #{usingDeptName}, EQUIP_TYPE_ID = #{equipTypeId}, EQUIP_ID = #{equipId}, EQUIP_NAME = #{equipName}, APP_TYPE = #{appType}, APP_CONTENT = #{appContent}, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_ID = #{maintenanceUnit}, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_NAME = #{maintenanceUnitName}, BUDGET_AMOUNT = #{budgetAmount}, REMARK = #{remark}, UPDATE_USER = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, PARENT_ID, QUOTA_CODE, PROJECT_NAME, PROJECT_CONTENT, UNIT, AMOUNT_EXCLUDING_TAX, TAX_RATE, AMOUNT_INCLUDING_TAX, CREATED_USER, CREATED_TIME, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, PROJECT_NUM FROM E_IC_MAINT_PROJ_APPLY_QUOTA WHERE PARENT_ID = #{id} ORDER BY CREATED_TIME DESC
